title: The Sun Pirates Are Born
description: On pages 6–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is the sun pirates are born.
scene: The scene follows the sun pirates are born, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The Grand Line

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Shaha Ahaha hah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: AAA RGH HAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Aim more care- fully!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're trying to, but they keep on disappearing under the water....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Guaa Aahhh!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hahh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: HNG HHH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: AaaG HH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Chu

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: Damn these fish-man scum!! Hand over all the former slaves!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: URG HH!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you do, we'll be willing to let you off -

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: rear Admiral! Sir they're attacking from under-neath the ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: NYUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Moha Hahah!! Mohah, Mohah !!!

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: Former slaves, eh?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And where's your proof there's any of those around here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ungh H!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Take a look at the bodies of my crew!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: I hear former slaves are always branded with a specific mark!! Do you see that on any of them?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: URGHH ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Men!! Take all their valuables and food supplies and return to the ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yeaaa H!!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Aahhh ...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Don't worry... We'll spare you your lives.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Shahah Ahaha hah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: "I sentence you... to death!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: In fact,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Your crime?! being a filthy human...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Hold it, Arlong!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Marinford, Marine HQ

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Vice Admiral Borsalino!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The vessel under the command of rear Admiral cadal of Branch station g2....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...has been sunk!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: OHhh? Why did he engage the enemy?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure I told him to just report their location to me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Apparently, as soon as they were close enough for visual confirmation

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...they found themselves surrounded by enemies in the water itself...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OHHAH? How scary! I guess that's underwater specialists for you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do we have any identification on the fishermen themselves?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: It would appear that the Arlong pirates, a group of fishermen who caused trouble in the regions around fish-man Island...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...have joined forces with tiger and are providing him support. However, as their activity has until now been restricted to the ocean depths...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...obtaining any definite measure of their strength is proving difficult. There are also reports of an extremely powerful individual...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...with a build matching that of tiger himself. But beyond that, we have nothing on him. Not even a name...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: How troublesome

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Owwww WW!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The hell was that for?! who cares what I do with a couple of inferior beings..?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I specifically instructed you all not to kill any of the humans.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Nghhh ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Remember someone

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can't the both of you see you're going a little too far?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This crew is not on a slaughter mission...!! So don't get the wrong idea!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But, big bro til! No, "Boss"! If I may speak...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Every last one of those humans was ready to take your life.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If the enemy is aiming to kill, it is only natural that we meet them with similar force!! The nerve of those humans....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we start taking lives, then we have already lost!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you really want to lower yourselves to their level?!

summary: The Sun Pirates Are Born. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
